title: Armor For Kings
description: Retextures armor to be more smooth
body:
**Armor For Kings** is a resource pack that smoothens out most of the armor that is in the game!

Armor For Kings:

✔️Removes the outline of nearly all armors.

🎨Adds colors that match all armors.

🤝It works perfectly fine with any mods/resource packs that don't change the armor textures.

💚It is Vanilla-Friendly

🎉It is still in alpha , but you can test it right now!

📈It is developing fast , so full Release is coming soon!

🎯The goal is for armor to feel much better!

💓You can download this resource pack to support me!


**Still Developing**

-Armor For Kings
